Frequently Asked Questions

What makes Darrell Lea the best candy brand in Australia?
Darrell Lea has been an iconic Australian confectionery brand since 1941, known for its premium quality chocolate and classic lollies like Milk Bullets and Mint Balls. Their dedication to using quality ingredients and traditional recipes has made them a trusted favourite among Australians for generations.
Are Fantales and Fantails the same lolly?
Fantales and Fantails refer to the same iconic Australian lolly—a wafer-based chocolate sweet that's been a beloved treat since the 1960s. The name variation is simply due to regional differences in how Australians refer to this classic confectionery.
What's the difference between the Darrell Lea Easter egg packs?
The main differences are in the filling flavours: the Milk Bullets pack offers creamy milk chocolate, the Mint Balls pack provides a refreshing mint flavour, and the Nougat Egg pack features rich nougat centres. All come in premium Easter packaging at $24.99-$29.99.
Where can I buy authentic Australian lollies like those mentioned in this guide?
You can find the full range of authentic Australian candies, including Darrell Lea products and other classic lollies, directly through Sweetsworld's online store at sweetsworld.com.au, which specialises in genuine local and imported confectionery.
Are these Darrell Lea Easter packs suitable for gift giving?
Yes, absolutely—the 2026 Darrell Lea Easter Egg Packs come in attractive Easter packaging and are perfect for gifting to chocolate lovers. They make ideal presents for friends, family, or Easter celebrations, with price points ranging from $24.99 to $29.99.
